jobs.title: Senior iOS Engineer
jobs.description:
We are looking for a Senior iOS Engineer to join our mobile team working on the WordPress iOS app.

Responsibilities:

  • Build and maintain features in Swift
  • Collaborate with product and design
  • Write unit and UI tests

Requirements:

  • 5+ years iOS development
  • Strong Swift, UIKit and SwiftUI knowledge
  • Experience with async/await and Combine

jobs.title: iOS Developer
jobs.description:
Buffer is hiring an iOS Developer to help build and grow our social media scheduling app.

What you'll do:

  • Develop new features from design specs
  • Maintain and improve existing codebase
  • Participate in code reviews

Requirements:

  • 3+ years iOS experience
  • Proficiency in Swift
  • Familiarity with Agile/Scrum

jobs.title: Mobile Engineer (iOS)
jobs.description:
Join Shopify's mobile team to build commerce experiences for merchants on iOS.

Responsibilities:

  • Build performant scalable iOS features
  • Drive technical architecture decisions
  • Mentor junior engineers

Requirements:

  • 7+ years mobile development
  • Expert-level Swift
  • Experience with large-scale apps

jobs.title: Junior iOS Developer
jobs.description:
Doist is hiring a Junior iOS Developer to work on Todoist, one of the world's most popular productivity apps.

You will:

  • Fix bugs and improve app stability
  • Build small features under guidance
  • Write tests for your code

Requirements:

  • 1+ year iOS experience or strong portfolio
  • Swift fundamentals
  • Passion for clean code

jobs.title: iOS Contractor
jobs.description:
Toptal is looking for an experienced iOS contractor for a 6-month fintech engagement.

Scope:

  • Architecture and implementation of a new iOS app
  • API integration and local data persistence
  • App Store submission support

Requirements:

  • 5+ years iOS
  • SwiftUI experience
  • Fintech or banking app background preferred
